pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing, much like the flickers of hope I once held in my heart. He is gone... and with him, the very light of my existence. I feel as though I am becoming a ghost even while I still breathe. Is there any point in enduring this cold, hollow silence? I find myself longing only to slip away into the velvet darkness and never wake to this misery again.
